{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18761","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18761/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18761/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18761/events","html_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18761","id":2502863424,"node_id":"I_kwDOAdw-Nc6VLqpA","number":18761,"title":"Difference  between conda and the singularity image generated in https://depot.galaxyproject.org","user":{"login":"lindenb","id":33838,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjMzODM4","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/33838?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/lindenb","html_url":"https://github.com/lindenb","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/lindenb/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/lindenb/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/lindenb/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/lindenb/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/lindenb/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/lindenb/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/lindenb/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/lindenb/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/lindenb/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-09-03T13:17:49Z","updated_at":"2024-09-03T13:17:49Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"
Hi all,
I'm trying to run a **nf-core** module that use the following recipe: https://github.com/bioconda/bioconda-recipes/blob/66c809b19344d7322e74375327bd1e4af323fb4e/recipes/jvarkit/meta.yaml#L30

```yaml
(...)
  run:
    - openjdk >=11
    - samtools >=1.20
    - bcftools >=1.20
(...)
```

when I run my module with nf-core with **conda** , i've got no problem.

But when I run the same test with the **singularity** image generated by **galaxy**: https://depot.galaxyproject.org/singularity/jvarkit:2024.08.25--hdfd78af_0', I get the following error: `bcftools: command not found`

So it looks like that the singularity image is lacking the tools required by the module ?


Another test:

```bash
$ wget -O test.img "https://depot.galaxyproject.org/singularity/jvarkit:2024.08.25--hdfd78af_0"
$ apptainer shell test.img
Singularity> which jvarkit
/usr/local/bin/jvarkit
Singularity> which bcftools
Singularity> 
```

Thanks for your help,
P.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18761/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18761/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null}}

contributors to Galaxy who are tagged in this PR:

Since 2021-04-07, Galaxy required MIT licensing for contributions.

We would like to re-license your prior contributions under the MIT license. This will help the entire project to switch to the MIT license from the Academic Free License which caused problems for packagers like Debian.

Please approve this pull request to signal your approval of this license change.

When you are done, feel free to `unsubscribe`; thank you! :heart:
